description: Stage-1 BeatDetector baseline. Phase 1 = RECORD ONLY; thresholds become hard assertions in Stage 2.

fixtures.label: clicktrack_50bpm
fixtures.formatted:
--- clicktrack_50bpm ---
  Duration       : 15.0s
  True BPM (mid) : 50.0
  BPM error      : mean=0.07 max=0.07 signed=0.07 (0.15%) [n=253]
  Beat offset    : mean=1.6ms p90=2.3ms median=1.8ms [11 matched]
  Beats          : emitted=12 GT=12 matched=11 FP=1 (4.0/min) miss=1 recall=91.7%
  Lock time      : 1.54s
  Confidence     : correct=0.371 wrong=0.000 r=0.000 [n=253]
  Octave error   : none
  Detection rate : 90.0% of state messages have tempo > 0
  Result         : PASS
